title: cupania pentapetala
intro: Cupania pentapetala, also known as the Yellow Cupania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cupania pentapetala include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
